summary.zh: 做游戏设计技能。在对话里输入 /make-game-design 触发,引导 cc-coder 系列 agent 在大约 30 分钟内,把「我想做个 XX 游戏」的一句话愿景拆成一份可直接交给程序落代码的最小设计文档,涵盖玩法、数值、角色与章节。产出落到 design/<slug>.md,后续工作台直接读它作为 ground truth。
summary.en: The make-game-design skill. Type /make-game-design and it guides cc-coder-style agents, in about thirty minutes, to turn a one-line 'I want to make X' vision into a minimal, build-ready design doc covering gameplay, numbers, characters and chapters. The output lands in design/<slug>.md, which downstream workbenches read as ground truth.

body.zh:
/make-game-design 触发
一句话愿景 → 可落码的最小设计文档
用到 balance:resim + code 读写,默认 agent cc-coder
body.en:
Triggered by /make-game-design
One-line vision → build-ready design doc
Uses balance:resim + code read/write; default agent cc-coder

body.zh: design/<slug>.md(玩法 / 数值 / 角色 / 章节)
